title: Lower Ghaghri Falls
tagline: Lower Ghaghri Falls — heritage city of Jharkhand

overview.short: Lower Ghaghri Falls is located 10 kilometres (6.2 mi) from Netarhat in Latehar district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.
overview.description: Lower Ghaghri Falls is located 10 kilometres (6.2 mi) from Netarhat in Latehar district in the Indian state of Jharkhand. It is the 33rd highest waterfall in India. It is known for its mesmerizing beauty and a major tourist attraction in Jharkhand. This waterfall is situated on the Ghaghri River, tributary of Auranga River.

topPlaces.name: Netarhat
topPlaces.description: Netarhat is a hill station in Latehar district in the Indian state of Jharkhand. The hill station is among the highest points of the Chotanagpur plateau.

items.note: Netarhat is a hill station in Latehar district in the Indian state of Jharkhand. The hill station is among the highest points of the Chotanagpur plateau.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Lower Ghaghri Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Lower Ghaghri Falls is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Lower Ghaghri Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Birsa Munda Airport, Ranchi (112 km) and the nearest railway station is Ranchi Junction (112 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Lower Ghaghri Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Lower Ghaghri Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Lower Ghaghri Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Lower Ghaghri Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
